items.title: AI推論躋身企業重要應用系統，F5最新報告點出多模型並用治理風險，以及身分管理成為企業採用AI代理的最大顧慮
items.summary: AI當道，隨著AI模型與代理式AI日益普及，網路應用程式交付與資安廠商F5今年5月最新發布的報告顯示，企業目前提供與防護應用系統的方式已因此徹底改變。

items.title: refactor: extract ACP runtime handle ensure flow
items.summary: refactor: extract ACP runtime handle ensure flow Extract ACP runtime-handle ensure/reuse/recreate flow into `manager.runtime-handle-ensure.ts`. Keeps `AcpSessionManager` focused on orchestration while preserving backend resolution, resume identity retry, metadata persistence, cache replacement, and concurrency-limit behavior. Proof: focused ACP manager runtime-handle/runtime-config/turn-result tests, narrow oxlint, prod + test type checks, autoreview clean, PR CI green.

items.title: fix(auth): add force re-login recovery and fallback auth skips
items.summary: fix(auth): add force re-login recovery and fallback auth skips Summary: - Add forced provider re-login support that clears cached auth profiles before running provider login again. - Add provider-auth remediation guidance and a session-scoped skip cache for known-bad fallback auth attempts. - Wire session ids through agent command, auto-reply, and embedded compaction fallback callers so the skip cache applies on real run paths. - Fail closed when forced auth profile removal cannot update the profile store. Verification: - Local format, lint, diff-check, focused Vitest shards, and autoreview passed. - PR CI, CodeQL Security High, and Critical Quality agent-runtime-boundary passed on head 1b4e9e753e50868ed763784b8211b406f8bdcf1d. Co-authored-by: Mert Basar

items.title: 駭客假借提供常見系統工具、濫用AI聊天機器人接觸受害者，意圖發動挖礦攻擊
items.summary: 在過往挖礦軟體攻擊當中，駭客可能選擇透過搜尋引擎最佳化中毒（SEO Poisoning）來接觸目標，盡可能地讓更多使用者上當，讓挖礦活動的收益最大化，不過有人採取更為細緻的方法過濾用戶，試圖接觸擁有更多GPU運算能力的電腦。
